title: Heita CAC/LTV by Acquisition Channel
description: SUPERSEDED by the in-app dashboard at /admin/cac-ltv (platform-admin gated), which computes per-channel merchant CAC/LTV directly from the app Postgres: channel from Business.acquisitionSource (UTM at onboarding), revenue/LTV from paid BusinessInvoice rows, and CAC from the AdSpend table — see src/server/services/acquisition-analytics.service.ts. This Grafana board remains a stub kept only for operators who prefer Grafana; wire its panels against the same tables/AdSpend if needed.

options.content: Stub for paid-CAC diligence dashboard. Join source comes from membership.joined joinChannel/referralUsed; value comes from loyalty.points_earned and loyalty.points_redeemed plus billing revenue. Replace text panels with warehouse/PostHog queries when CAC spend import lands.
